content.en:
These members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan did not stay here for long, and soon left one by one.

As for whether there were any members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan who had fallen into the Reincarnation Ruins, they didn't care.

After another period of time, the reincarnation ruins were completely closed.

......

Reincarnation Ruins.

Several of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies were still here, and suddenly an invisible hand pinched him.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

Several of his replica bodies were pinched and exploded at the same time, and they were pinched and exploded instantly, without any chance to fight back.

"It's the spirit of reincarnation!"

Moreover, this spirit of reincarnation is not known to be many times stronger than the spirit of reincarnation he encountered before, so he naturally does not even have the slightest hope of escaping.

"No wonder no reincarnation celestial clan dares to stay in the reincarnation ruins, once they stay, they will definitely die!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, the replica body left in the reincarnation ruins has been destroyed, and he can't enter it anymore, so naturally he no longer pays attention to the reincarnation ruins.

At this time.

His Ao Chen's replica body was already in Fengyu City, and after waiting for a while, he would go and meet his real replica body and send some resources back to the land of eternity.

For example, resources such as reincarnation flow marrow will naturally be sent back!

At the same time, he was also inquiring about the usefulness of the Ruined Heavenly Realm Crystal, but ordinary members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan did not know the specific use of this thing, and I was afraid that only the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan knew its value.

However, he can't directly ask the high-level of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, in that case, it will be easy to attract the attention of the high-level of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan!

"Keep it low-key for now!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian saw that almost no one paid attention to him, so he left Fengyu City and went to the rift where the land of the Innocent Demon Vine bordered the reincarnation dark domain.

Some time later, he arrived.

Then, he went straight through the rift and into the Innocent Abyss.

Of course.

He didn't stay here for long, otherwise there might have been something unknown.

After he only gave those resources to the real body to copy the body, he quickly returned to the reincarnation dark domain.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian came back with the reincarnation flow marrow, and then began to refine the reincarnation flow marrow.

Rumble!

His reincarnation Haotian body and reincarnation Haotian origin were all rapidly improving, and his aura quickly became stronger.

"The effect of reincarnation is too good!" Ye Tian was excited.

With so much reincarnation flow marrow, it wouldn't be long before his true body broke through to the fourth balance.

The other side.

Reincarnation Dark Domain.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body was also preparing to refine a reincarnation treasure.

He found a lot of reincarnation gold in the ruins of reincarnation, and it was not a problem to refine several reincarnation treasures, so he naturally wanted to refine a reincarnation treasure!

Although the Reincarnation Dark Domain does not have the Heart Flame of the Origin Ancestor, it has a similar flame.

......

Reincarnation Fire Tower.

This is a place of the Reincarnation Celestials, who introduced the flame of a reincarnation fire into the Reincarnation Fire Tower, and created a weapon forging room for refining weapons.

The high-level leaders of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan's refining of the Reincarnation Arcana or other weapons are all carried out here.

Therefore, in the dark realm of reincarnation, refining the reincarnation treasure is naturally much easier.

Soon.

Ye Tian applied to enter the Reincarnation Fire Tower.

The Reincarnation Heavenly Clan didn't know that Ye Tian wanted to refine the reincarnation treasure, and thought that Ye Tian was refining a second-level weapon!

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian entered the Reincarnation Fire Tower and rented a weapon forging room.

Enter the Armory Forge Room.

Ye Tian saw a reincarnation fire spreading out from a magic circle.

"The fury of the Reincarnation Fire has been suppressed by the Reincarnation Fire Tower, using this flame is hundreds of times easier than using the Heart Flame Fire to refine last time, and it can definitely be easily refined!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And he is ready to continue refining the reincarnation treasure of the gun, which can also fit the supreme divine power of reincarnation-the spear of the ruin.

It was not the first time Ye Tian had refined, so the whole process was very easy.

As time passed, after a period of time, a reincarnation treasure was successfully refined.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian quickly refined this reincarnation treasure, felt the power of the reincarnation treasure, and combined with the reincarnation supreme divine power of the ruin heaven spear, he was now sure to use this arcane dust to copy his body and kill the six awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

He didn't continue refining the reincarnation treasure, those reincarnation gold were kept, in case they would be useful in the future!

Besides, it is enough to have a reincarnation treasure in the dark realm of reincarnation, and there is no need to refine another one.

After coming out of the Reincarnation Fire Tower, Ye Tian stayed in Fengyu City and cultivated honestly.

He has gained a lot of resources, and he can easily improve the cultivation of Ao Chen's copy body, or it won't be long before he can definitely break through to the realm of the third balance.

If Ao Chen's copy body breaks through to the third balance, his strength will surpass that of his true copy body.

After all, there is no reincarnation supreme power for replicating the real body, but Aochen has a replicating body.

"The supreme supernatural power of reincarnation can also be created, and I will have to spend some years studying the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation in the future!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

The years passed.

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian has been refining the reincarnation flow marrow, and his cultivation has continued to skyrocket, and his strength has increased rapidly.

Gradually, his cultivation was raised to the limit of the third balance, and he could go to the fourth balance.

And the reincarnation flow of the marrow also helps to impact the fourth balance, and with the three-source secret medicine, the success rate of the breakthrough is definitely not low.

But.

He tried to break through a few times, but found that the effect of the three-source secret medicine was poor again, so he spent a little time and used better treasures to refine the three-source secret medicine, creating a better three-source secret medicine.

He then went on to hit the fourth balance.

With the brand-new three-source secret medicine, Ye Tian only had to hit it once and directly broke through.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke the shackles, from the third balance to the fourth balance.

Most of his reincarnation Haotian body, reincarnation Haotian origin, and origin realm will were all integrated, and the endless energy was absorbed by him, and his body continued to transform into growth.

After a long time, his aura had changed dramatically.

"I'm much stronger than I used to be!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And.

Aochen's copy body is about to break through to the third balance.

Once you break through to the third balance and improve your strength, you may have the hope of entering the high-level circle of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

A few more days have passed.

Reincarnation Dark Domain.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body finally broke through to the third balance, and the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan's bloodline completed the three awakenings, and his strength transformed.

At this time, he is ready to plan to enter the circle of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, so that he can get more information, learn more secrets, and hope to get more good things!
